body:
Fixes #4.

## Summary
- Replaced the demo deploy job's `peaceiris/actions-gh-pages` branch push with the official GitHub Pages artifact deployment flow: `configure-pages`, `upload-pages-artifact`, and `deploy-pages`.
- Exposed the Pages deployment URL from the deploy job and made the GitHub Pages e2e job test that exact deployed URL.
- Added workflow regression tests so the release workflow cannot silently return to `gh-pages` branch publishing for a workflow-sourced Pages site.
- Added a case study with preserved logs/raw data and a template comparison across JS, Rust, Python, and C# pipeline templates.
- Added CI/CD troubleshooting docs for the “deploy succeeded but Pages did not update” failure mode.

## Reproduction and Root Cause
The failed run `25746871509` reported a successful `Deploy Demo to GitHub Pages` job while the later `E2E Tests (GitHub Pages)` job failed against `https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai` with 14 failures. The preserved repo Pages settings show `build_type: workflow`, but the old workflow only pushed `docs/demo` to the `gh-pages` branch. That branch push can succeed without creating or serving a Pages deployment for a workflow-sourced Pages site, which produced the false-positive deploy job.

Full investigation and raw evidence are in `docs/case-studies/issue-4/README.md`.

## Template Follow-up
The JS template already uses the official Pages artifact flow. The Rust template still has the same risky `peaceiris/actions-gh-pages` pattern for docs, so I filed an upstream template issue: https://github.com/link-foundation/rust-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template/issues/48

## Verification
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo test --test unit ci_cd::workflow_release`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request GITHUB_HEAD_REF=issue-4-1e8c9b0d59e2 GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-version-modification.rs`
- `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request rust-script scripts/detect-code-changes.rs`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/release.yml"); puts "workflow yaml parsed"'`
- `npm ci` from `tests/e2e`
- `npx playwright install chromium` from `tests/e2e`
- `npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js` from `tests/e2e` (14 passed)

title: Fix GitHub Pages workflow deployment false positive
